title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Honda Motorcycle India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Honda Motorcycle India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Honda Motorcycle India in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Honda Motorcycle India:
Honda Motorcycle India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Honda Motorcycle India!
